projectDescription: BlockForecast is a crypto prediction market platform where users can trade on real-world events, creators can launch their own markets and earn fees, and developers can integrate via a public REST API with AI-powered oracle resolution.
keyFeatures: User-created prediction markets on any topic
AI oracle resolution with multi-agent consensus
Creator program with 0.5% fee on every trade
In-app crypto bridge for USDC deposits (Base L2)
Public REST API with API key authentication
x402 micropayment agent API ($1 per market creation)
Real-time oracle dashboard and platform transparency metrics
Geo-availability for Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, and more
Comparison-friendly positioning vs Polymarket and Kalshi
publicApiSurface: POST /markets — create a new market (creator access required)
GET /markets/:id/trades — list trades for a market
POST /x402/markets — create a market via x402 micropayment ($1)
API key authentication via Authorization header
